releaseNotes.zh-CN:
DataWhere 1.2.2

新功能
- 模版库系统：收藏所有数据源类型的常用对象，一键跳转恢复上下文
- 模版导入/导出：批量分享配置，含关联数据源
- 全局搜索对话框：快捷键呼出，随时搜索
- 搜索历史记录与搜索建议
- 数据源类型筛选，快速定位目标
- Tab 标签页拖拽排序（带平滑动画）
- Tab 标签页显示数据源连接状态
- 最近工作台标签页管理
- 工作台头部显示 host:port 连接信息
- 数据源列表支持按环境筛选
- 数据源健康检查

修复
- 模版跳转失效检测：目标对象已删除或重命名时弹出提示
- SQL 工作台输入框右侧滚动条遮挡边框
- 多项工作台稳定性修复
releaseNotes.en-US:
DataWhere 1.2.2

New Features
- Template Library: bookmark frequently used objects across all datasource types, one-click navigation to restore context
- Template import/export: batch share configurations with linked datasources
- Global search dialog: invoke with shortcut, search anytime
- Search history and suggestions
- Datasource type filter for quick targeting
- Tab drag-and-drop reordering with smooth animation
- Tab shows datasource connection status indicator
- Recent workspace tab management
- Workspace header displays host:port connection info
- Datasource list filter by environment
- Datasource health check

Fixes
- Template navigation expiry detection: warns when target object has been deleted or renamed
- SQL workspace textarea scrollbar obscuring right border
- Multiple workspace stability fixes
